title: Garmin selects AMIT International as exclusive distributor for India
text: Expanded strategic relationship will bring innovative Garmin fitness, outdoor and automotive products to customers in rapidly growing country for the first time OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced that AMIT International will serve as its exclusive distributor in India, expanding the companies' long-term strategic relationship in the rapidly growing country.

title: Get Ahead of the Game With These 3 Tech Stocks With Skyrocketing Potential
text: Amid a flight to safety across the broader market, investors are now eyeing up undervalued tech stocks bargains. The companies on this list were chosen due to their high growth potential as well as them trading at undervalued multiplies.

title: Garmin Fast Track to Tech program offers high school students a viable alternative to college
text: Virtual informational sessions on Oct. 26 aim to help teens jumpstart careers in tech OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) is excited to introduce Fast Track to Tech, an innovative on-the-job training program designed specifically for high school seniors.

title: Garmin introduces next-gen ECHOMAP Ultra 2 series
text: New chartplotters offer premium sonar and mapping, wireless networking and more OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN), the world's most innovative and recognized marine electronics manufacturer, today announced the ECHOMAP™ Ultra 2 chartplotter series designed with advanced features for inland and nearshore anglers.

title: Take sportfishing to extreme depths with the new GSD 28 from Garmin
text: Powered by RapidReturn sonar with next-gen xCHIRP technology, the GSD 28 provides  Garmin's clearest and most detailed fish arch returns OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN), the world's most innovative and recognized marine electronics manufacturer, today announced the GSD™ 28 , a high-powered sonar module engineered for serious sportfishing.

title: Light the way with the new D2 Mach 1 Pro aviator smartwatch from Garmin
text: Most capable D2 smartwatch yet includes full suite of aviation features, longer battery life and flashlight OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced its latest aviator smartwatch – the D2™ Mach 1 Pro.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Bolsters Smartwatch Offerings With ECG App
text: Garmin (GRMN) incorporates ECG App into its smartwatch lineup, namely, epix Pro, fenix 7 Pro, Venu 3 and tactix 7, enabling users to record an ECG and check vital signs directly from their smartwatch.

title: Garmin co-founders selected to join National Aviation Hall of Fame
text: Dr. Min Kao and the late Gary Burrell will be recognized for contributions and excellence in aviation and aeronautics OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced that co-founders Dr. Min Kao and the late Gary Burrell have been named to the prestigious National Aviation Hall of Fame (NAHF).

title: Garmin expands ECG App to additional smartwatches, including its flagship epix Pro and fēnix 7 Pro series
text: FDA-cleared and clinically-validated app lets even more Garmin customers record an ECG and check for signs of atrial fibrillation right from their smartwatch OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) is pleased to announce the expansion of the ECG App1 to the epix™ Pro series, fēnix® 7 Pro series, Venu® 3 series and tactix® 7 – AMOLED Edition smartwatches.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Boosts MARQ Lineup to Expand Smartwatch Offerings
text: Garmin (GRMN) rolls out the MARQ Carbon collection, comprising Athlete, Golfer, and Commander multisport smartwatches for athletes and adventure enthusiasts.

title: Textron Aviation adds cutting-edge Garmin Autothrottle system to the Cessna Citation M2 Gen2
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation announced that its renowned Cessna Citation M2 Gen2 will include Garmin Autothrottles.

title: Garmin unveils the MARQ Carbon collection: Modern tool watches crafted from uniquely engineered carbon fiber
text: Stronger and lighter than ever before, the new collection is the pinnacle of premium materials, luxury and performance OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced the MARQ® Carbon collection, three luxury modern tool watches each crafted from 130 layers of Fused Carbon Fiber™.

title: Garmin GPSMAP 9227 wins IBEX Innovation Award
text: Award honors ingenuity and outstanding product development in the recreational boating industry OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN), the world's most innovative and recognized marine electronics manufacturer, today announced that its GPSMAP® 9227 with Garmin BlueNet™ was awarded a 2023 Innovation Award at the International BoatBuilders' Exhibition and Conference (IBEX) tradeshow held Oct. 3-5, 2023.

title: Garmin recognized as the 2023 Most Innovative Marine Company
text: Leading trade publication honors companies shaping the future of the marine industry OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN), the world's most innovative and recognized marine electronics manufacturer, is proud to announce it has been named the Most Innovative Marine Company for 2023 by Soundings Trade Only, a leading trade publication for the recreational boating industry.

title: 7 Top Tech Stocks to Buy That Also Pay Dividends
text: Although the innovation space generally focuses on growth, these tech stocks that pay dividends prove that the sector is more diverse than advertised. Essentially, investors can get the best of both worlds, leveraging the power of digitalization combined with passive income.

title: Garmin (GRMN) Boosts Aviation Business With Latest Move
text: Garmin (GRMN) announces a long-term agreement to provide the state-of-the-art Garmin G3000 integrated flight deck to BETA Technologies.

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio: First Year Is Coming Down To The Wire
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF, with a few minor twists. The portfolio fell by 6.29% in September, underperforming the S&P 500 by 1.53%. Year-to-date, the portfolio is up 6.89%. Since its inception, the portfolio has generated 1.90% of alpha over the S&P 500.

title: Garmin Ltd. schedules third quarter 2023 earnings call
text: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland , Oct. 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin Ltd. (NYSE: GRMN) invites shareholders and investors to listen to its third quarter 2023 earnings conference call on Wednesday, November 1, 2023 at 10:30 a.m.

title: Garmin integrated flight deck selected by BETA Technologies for its all-electric aircraft
text: OLATHE, Kan. , Oct. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Garmin (NYSE: GRMN) today announced a long-term agreement to provide the state-of-the-art Garmin G3000® integrated flight deck  to BETA Technologies for its CX300 revolutionary electric fixed-wing aircraft and A250 electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft.

title: Neptune Aviation to Offer Garmin Avionics Conversion Services
text: Decades of Experience and Full Range of Services Ensure Compliance, Safety and Can Minimize Aircraft Downtime Missoula, Montana--(Newsfile Corp. - October 2, 2023) - Neptune Aviation, a leader in aerial firefighting and aviation services, is now an authorized Garmin dealer and can offer its customers Garmin's line of industry-leading aviation supplies and avionics solutions, including GPS navigation systems, transponders, advanced displays, and other aviation products. Neptune can also deliver comprehensive Garmin services, including system upgrades, technical support and maintenance, aircraft painting and inspections, making it a one-stop shop for the aviation industry.
